records.question: Which campuses in Turlock, Stanislaus county, were established in 1957 and had exactly 395 undergraduate enrollments and at most 56 graduate enrollments in 2004, where campus fees were at least 1915 in or before 1996?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN csu_fees ON campuses.id = csu_fees.campus
JOIN discipline_enrollments ON campuses.id = discipline_enrollments.campus
WHERE discipline_enrollments.graduate <= 56 AND campuses.location = 'Turlock' AND discipline_enrollments.undergraduate = 395 AND discipline_enrollments.year = 2004 AND campuses.year = 1957 AND csu_fees.year <= 1996 AND campuses.county = 'Stanislaus' AND csu_fees.campusfee >= 1915
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.Id AS campuses_id
FROM Campuses c
JOIN discipline_enrollments de ON c.Id = de.Campus
JOIN csu_fees f ON c.Id = f.Campus
WHERE c.Location = 'Turlock'
  AND c.County = 'Stanislaus'
  AND c.Year = 1957
  AND de.Year = 2004
  AND de.Undergraduate = 395
  AND de.Graduate <= 56
  AND f.Year <= 1996
  AND f.CampusFee >= 1915

records.question: Which campuses have CSU fees, degrees, and enrollments records, and have a total enrollment in the academic year exactly equal to 704?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN csu_fees ON campuses.id = csu_fees.campus
JOIN degrees ON campuses.id = degrees.campus
JOIN enrollments ON campuses.id = enrollments.campus
WHERE enrollments.totalenrollment_ay = 704
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.Id
FROM Campuses c
JOIN csu_fees f ON c.Id = f.Campus
JOIN degrees d ON c.Id = d.Campus
JOIN enrollments e ON c.Id = e.Campus
WHERE e.TotalEnrollment_AY = 704

records.question: Which campuses awarded exactly 4228 degrees and had enrollments with an FTE of 6234 in 1959 or earlier?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN degrees ON campuses.id = degrees.campus
JOIN enrollments ON campuses.id = enrollments.campus
WHERE enrollments.year <= 1959 AND enrollments.fte_ay = 6234 AND degrees.degrees = 4228
records.pred_sql:
SELECT d.Campus AS id
FROM degrees d
JOIN enrollments e ON d.Campus = e.Campus AND d.Year = e.Year
WHERE d.Degrees = 4228
  AND e.FTE_AY = 6234
  AND d.Year <= 1959
  AND e.Year <= 1959

records.question: Which campuses named California State University-Dominguez Hills in Carson, Los Angeles county, established in 1960, had enrollment in discipline 11 in 2004?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN discipline_enrollments ON campuses.id = discipline_enrollments.campus
WHERE campuses.campus = 'California State University-Dominguez Hills' AND campuses.year = 1960 AND campuses.county = 'Los Angeles' AND campuses.location = 'Carson' AND discipline_enrollments.year = 2004 AND discipline_enrollments.discipline = 11
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Campuses.Id
FROM Campuses
JOIN discipline_enrollments ON Campuses.Id = discipline_enrollments.Campus
WHERE Campuses.Campus = 'California State University-Dominguez Hills'
  AND Campuses.Location = 'Carson'
  AND Campuses.County = 'Los Angeles'
  AND Campuses.Year = 1960
  AND discipline_enrollments.Discipline = 11
  AND discipline_enrollments.Year = 2004

records.question: Which campuses had enrollments exactly in 1946 and CSU fees from 1996 or later?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN csu_fees ON campuses.id = csu_fees.campus
JOIN enrollments ON campuses.id = enrollments.campus
WHERE csu_fees.year >= 1996 AND enrollments.year = 1946
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Campuses.Id
FROM Campuses
JOIN enrollments ON Campuses.Id = enrollments.Campus AND enrollments.Year = 1946
JOIN csu_fees ON Campuses.Id = csu_fees.Campus AND csu_fees.Year >= 1996

records.question: Which campuses in San Luis Obispo have a year of 1901, total enrollment of at least 16394, full-time equivalent enrollment of at most 15148, at least 3411 degrees awarded, and fees from the year 1996?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT campuses.id FROM campuses
JOIN csu_fees ON campuses.id = csu_fees.campus
JOIN degrees ON campuses.id = degrees.campus
JOIN enrollments ON campuses.id = enrollments.campus
WHERE campuses.year = 1901 AND enrollments.totalenrollment_ay >= 16394 AND degrees.degrees >= 3411 AND enrollments.fte_ay <= 15148 AND campuses.location = 'San Luis Obispo' AND csu_fees.year = 1996
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.Id
FROM Campuses c
JOIN enrollments e ON c.Id = e.Campus AND e.Year = 1901
JOIN degrees d ON c.Id = d.Campus AND d.Year = 1901
JOIN csu_fees f ON c.Id = f.Campus AND f.Year = 1996
WHERE c.Location = 'San Luis Obispo'
  AND e.TotalEnrollment_AY >= 16394
  AND e.FTE_AY <= 15148
  AND d.Degrees >= 3411
